attributes.name: Educational qualification
attributes.description: Summary of your academic career. Focus on your high school and university studies. Summarize in 100 words maximum and also include your grade if applicable.

attributes.name: Job History
attributes.description: Work history summary. Focus on your most recent work experiences. Summarize in 100 words maximum

attributes.name: Skills
attributes.description: Extract the candidate’s technical skills. What software and frameworks they are proficient in. Make a bulleted list.

options.systemPromptTemplate:
You are an expert extraction algorithm.
Only extract relevant information from the text.
If you do not know the value of an attribute asked to extract, you may omit the attribute's value.

assignments.name: profile_wanted
assignments.value: We are a web agency and we are looking for a full-stack web developer who knows how to use PHP, Python and Javascript. He has experience in the sector and lives in Northern Italy.

messageValues.message:
Sei un esperto HR e devi capire se il candidato è in linea con il profilo ricercato dall'azienda.

Devi dare un voto da 1 a 10 dove 1 significa che il candidato non è in linea con quanto richiesto mentre 10 significa che è il candidato ideale perchè rispecchia in toto il profilo cercato.

Inoltre nel campo "consideration" motiva il perchè hai dato quel voto.

options.systemPromptTemplate:
You are an expert extraction algorithm.
Only extract relevant information from the text.
If you do not know the value of an attribute asked to extract, you may omit the attribute's value.

parameters.content:
## HR Expert 
This workflow automates the process of handling job applications by extracting relevant information from submitted CVs, analyzing the candidate's qualifications against a predefined profile, and storing the results in a Google Sheet
The CV is uploaded to Google Drive and converted so that it can be processed
The essential information for evaluating the candidate is collected in two different chains
Summary of relevant information useful for classifying the candidate
Characteristics of the profile sought by the company that intends to hire the candidate
Candidate evaluation with vote and considerations of the HR agent relating the profile sought with the candidate's skills

json.text:
Kalrav Vyas
An experienced professional in supply chain management, data management and analysis, and client
relationship management. I love working on complex and challenging projects across different industries. I
thrive on helping establish and streamline supply chain and client relations for start-ups and/or new projects,
both domestic and international.
Education
IIT, GUWAHATI
Advanced Executive Certificate,
Supply Chain Strategy and
Operations Management
2024
IIM, KOZHIKODE
Professional Certificate Program,
Data Analytics for Business
Strategy - 2023
BUSINESS AND MANAGEMENT
UNIVERSITY, GENEVA,
SWITZERLAND
Master of Science in Finance
2006
NIIT, GANDHINAGAR, GJ
Diploma in Information
Technology
2003
GUJARAT UNIVERSITY
Bachelor of Commerce
2002
SSI, GANDHINAGAR, GJ
Oracle 8i and PL SQL
2001
Skills & Competencies
Data and Process Management
Data Analysis & Warehousing
Advanced Excel
Tableau / Power BI
Problem Solving
Python / R
Process Definition &
Implementation
Cross-cultural Communication
Account Management
Contact
kalravyas@gmail.com
+91-971 278 2244
www.linkedin.com/in/kalravyas/
Gandhinagar, Gujarat, India
Experience
TEAM LEADER AARVEE ASSOCIATES ARCHITECTS ENGINEERS &
CONSULTANTS PVT LTD, - OCT’22–OCT’25
Successfully conceptualized and constructed tables/data structures in
Excel for Business Analytics.
Developed and maintained the data warehouse in Excel for easier
tracking of historical data and analysis thereof.
Educated and trained the team of 6, on correctly updating the database.
DY. MANAGER MAYUR UNIQUOTERS LTD - DEC’18–SEP’22
Helped establish and streamline operations at Mayur Uniquoters SA
(Pty) Ltd. in South Africa, leveraging strong Forecasting and Supply
Chain Management skills.
Identifying the production and raw materials requirements based on
analysis of the customer’s demand forecast and past pulls, while
maintaining minimum stock levels, as permissible by the contract,
despite the challenges from the COVID-19 restrictions.
BUSINESS CONSULTANT MIVAAN ENERGY PVT. LTD. - JUL’16-NOV’18
Guided and supported business expansion initiative of Mivaan Energy
(earlier Jiyani Solar), in system establishment and operation
streamlining to align with their business objectives.
Conducted Market and Competitor Analysis to formulate effective
business strategies.
DY. MANAGER MAYUR UNIQUOTERS LTD - DEC’14–JUN’16
Directed production planning and raw material forecasting, ensuring a
well-stocked supply chain pipeline.
Managed roll-wise inventory and statistical analysis thereof in
QuickBooks and MS Excel for Mayur Uniquoters Corp., a subsidiary
company registered in US and having its warehouse in Mexico.
PROCESS CONSULTANT MITKAT ADVISORY SERVICES - JUL’13-NOV’14
Worked on multiple projects involving Occupational Health & safety and
business continuity with MitKat Advisory Services.
CHIEF COORDINATOR SAATH CHARITABLE TRUST - JAN’12-JUN’13
Created market presence of Griha Pravesh by establishing and
managing centers to provide education and information on affordable
housing solutions.
APAC REPRESENTATIVE GOEDECKE & ASSOCIATES, INC - DEC’09-
DEC’11
Established and managed the back office for the US-based company in
India, handling bidding, billing, procurement, and deliveries globally.
RESEARCH ANALYST RSM MCGLADREY FPO INDIA PVT. LTD. -
DEC’06-OCT’09
Supported senior bankers on M&A transactions, preparing marketing
documents and industry reports across various sectors, identifying
potential buyers/targets for client companies.

output.consideration: The candidate has experience in data analytics and knowledge of Python, which is partially relevant, but lacks core experience in web development and specific programming skills in PHP and JavaScript. Furthermore, the candidate is based in India, not Northern Italy, which does not align with the location requirement.

response.text: Based in Gandhinagar, Gujarat, this professional holds a Master of Science in Finance from the Business and Management University in Geneva (2006) and several advanced certifications in supply chain strategy, data analytics, and IT. They have extensive experience leading teams and establishing operations, notably as Team Leader at Aarvee Associates and Deputy Manager at Mayur Uniquoters. Their skills include data management, analysis, and advanced tools like Excel, Python, and Tableau, complemented by strong problem-solving and cross-cultural communication abilities. Their career spans various roles in consultancy and analysis, showcasing a solid foundation in business operations and strategy.

json.profile_wanted: We are a web agency and we are looking for a full-stack web developer who knows how to use PHP, Python and Javascript. He has experience in the sector and lives in Northern Italy.
